name: quarkus-migration
description: Spring Boot to Quarkus migration. Bundles the official migrate-spring-to-quarkus skill (modular, gate-driven), the apply-governed-logging skill (applies the Lloyds Governed Logging Library to every migrated service), and 10 Quarkus framework-dev skills from quarkusio (Apache-2.0, see ATTRIBUTION.md), plus the quarkus-migrator agent and a verified OpenRewrite reference.
